page_content:
Prerequisite: KNES360.

KNES711 Professional Development and Grantsmanship (3 Credits) Enhance continued professional development through an exploration of culture, climate, expectations and mentoring in research | universities. Generate a grant application including the hypothesis, structure, specific aims, background and significance, and submission of a total grant. Grant process and product will be emphasized.

Restriction: Must be a Doctoral student; and must be in a major in SPHL- School of Public Health.

Credit Only Granted for. KNES711 or KNES789X.
